About: It is about the Virgin Mary.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with numerous miracles.
BelongsTo: It belongs to a family of images of the Theotokos known as Hodegetria.
ConsistsOf: It consists of figures except the faces covered by a chased riza of silver and gold.
DiscoveredAt: It was discovered at the gates of the monastery.
DiscoveredBy: It was discovered by Gabriel the Iberian.
DiscoveredIn: It was discovered in the Mediterranean Sea.
HasA: It has a scar on the Virgin Mary's right cheek or her chin.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a scar on the Virgin Mary's right cheek or her chin.
HeldIn: It was held in the Iveron monastery on Mount Athos in Greece.
It was held in the katholikon of the monastery.
It was held in a small Chapel next to the Gates.
It was held in the Iverskaya Chapel in Moscow.
It was held in the Dormition Cathedral, Moscow.
HeldOn: It was held on Tuesday of Bright Week.
It was held on Bright Tuesday.
IsA: It is an Eastern Orthodox icon of the Virgin Mary.
It is a prototype which has been copied numerous times.
KnownAs: It is known as the Iviron Theotokos.
It is known as Iverskaya in Russian.
It is known as Portaitissa or Gate-Keeper.
KnownFor: It is known for numerous miracles attributed to it.
LocatedIn: It is located on Mount Athos in Greece.
It is located next to the Gates.
It is located next to the Kremlin walls in Moscow.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the period of Byzantine iconoclasm under the Emperor Theophilus.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Mediterranean Sea.
OccurredOn: It occurred on Tuesday of Bright Week.
PartOf: It is part of the Hodegetria family of images.
UsedAs: It is used as a protectress.
It is used as an iconostasis above the Holy Doors.
It is used as a venerated icon.
UsedIn: It is used in Orthodox temples.
It is used in the Iveron Monastery.
UsedTo: It is used to point to Christ.
WrittenBy: It was written by Luke the Evangelist.

Affects: それは信者に影響を与えます。
AssociatedWith: それは数々の奇跡に関連しています。
BelongsTo: それはホデゲトリアとして知られるテオトコスの画像のファミリーに属しています。
ConsistsOf: それは、銀と金の打ち出し細工で覆われた顔を除いて、人物で構成されています。
DiscoveredAt: それは修道院の門で発見されました。
DiscoveredBy: それはガブリエル・イベリコスによって発見されました。
DiscoveredIn: それは地中海で発見されました。
HasA: それは聖母マリアの右の頬またはあごに傷跡があります。
HasFeatureOf: それは聖母マリアの右の頬またはあごの傷跡によって特徴づけられます。
HeldIn: それはギリシャのアトス山にあるイベロン修道院にありました。

それはモスクワの生神女就寝大聖堂にありました。
HeldOn: それは光火曜日にありました。
それは3月31日にありました。
それは2月12日にありました。
それは光火曜日にありました。
それは10月13日にありました。
IsA: それは聖母マリアの東方正教会のイコンです。

KnownAs: それはイヴィロン・テオトコスとして知られています。

KnownFor: それは、それに帰せられる数々の奇跡で知られています。
LocatedIn: それはギリシャのアトス山にあります。

それはモスクワのクレムリンの壁の隣にあります。

UsedAs: それは保護者として使われます。
